calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-08-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Joseph Thornton. Sondra Livingston-Carr for and with Ronald Buggs.

Ms. Livingston-Carr stated that they have no objection and accept the final accounting. Mr. Siracusa explained that this was a time consuming complicated matter, explained services provided/work performed which benefited the estate and stated that they do not ordinarily keep time records. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-05-2014 Continued To Mar-26-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2037-2039 Scott Street S.F.)
Off Calendar Jun-03-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Executor. Christina sherman for Ronald Buggs.

Mr. Siracusa provided an endorsed copy of a Waiver of Notice from Inheritance Funding. The sale was confirmed at $2,488,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

Petition To Approve Settlement Agreement And Authorize Executor To Implement The Settlement Agreement.
Off Calendar Sep-24-2012 Advanced From Nov-05-12 To Oct-02-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Approve Settlement Agreement And Authorize Executor To Implement The Settlement Agreement.
Off Calendar Oct-02-2012 Granted Per Written Order

Shortening And Advancing Hearing Date On Petitiion To Approve Settlement Agreement And Etc.
Off Calendar Sep-24-2012 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-05-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lawrence Siracusa for Joseph Thronton (Executor). Christina Sherman for and with Ronald Buggs. Donald Buggs in Propria Persona.

There are no objections by any Party. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary with full authority (order for the same signed in open Court). Bond is not required.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Santiago.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-21-2012 Continued To Sep-05-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
